items.name: Runtime
items.description: Blazing-fast Luau runtime in Rust with modular cdylib architecture. Async task scheduler (spawn, defer, delay, wait, cancel), custom require resolver with .luaurc aliases, bytecode compilation, JIT/CodeGen. Scripts load native libs (dll/dylib/so) via runtime.loadlib. Embeddable via C-ABI in any language: C, C++, Python, C#, Node.js, Go, Swift...
